g.text: Start with KerfCut today. When KerfStock launches, upgrade to the full suite at a prorated discount. your existing investment carries over fully.
Risk-free optimization. If KerfCut doesn’t improve your material yield, contact us within 14 days for a full refund.
If you have any issues with any of our tools, our customer service department is here for you.
Prices are subject to change once the full suite launches. Early adopters lock in their current rate for life, renewal prices will never increase
beyond what you paid in year one.
